data.name: Aduro Clean Technologies Inc.
data.description: Aduro Clean Technologies Inc. engages in developing water-based chemical recycling technologies. The company's platform converts end-of-life plastics and tire rubber to specialty chemicals and fuels; upgrades heavy crude oils; and transforms renewable oils into renewable fuels and specialty chemicals.
